prompt: Rain-streaked glass window filling the frame, shot from inside looking out at blurred neon signs — green, red, and pink light sources competing and bleeding into each other through the water droplets. Hyper-saturated colors smearing across wet surface. Heavy film grain texture. No readable text on signs — just abstract neon color shapes. Claustrophobic tight framing, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
